name: flight505-plugins
description: Official marketplace for flight505's Claude Code plugins - SDK Bridge, TaskPlex, Storybook Assistant, Project Planner, Nano Banana, AI Frontier, Code Coach, and Recall

plugins.name: sdk-bridge
plugins.description: PRD-driven autonomous development — generates PRDs, converts to execution format, runs fresh Claude instances with quality gates until complete. Two-stage review, TDD enforcement, failure categorization.

plugins.name: storybook-assistant
plugins.description: SOTA 2026 Storybook assistant with Vision AI design-to-code, natural language generation, AI-powered accessibility remediation, React Server Components, dark mode generation, and comprehensive testing

plugins.name: claude-project-planner
plugins.description: Production-ready project planning with progress tracking, error recovery, and comprehensive research - generates architecture docs, sprint plans, cost analyses, and implementation roadmaps

plugins.name: nano-banana
plugins.description: AI-powered image and diagram generation using state-of-the-art models via OpenRouter with quality review and iteration

plugins.name: taskplex
plugins.description: Development companion that right-sizes process to task complexity — TDD enforcement, proportional verification, systematic debugging, tier-based routing. Pure markdown skills, zero runtime dependencies.

plugins.name: ai-frontier
plugins.description: Deep research intelligence — SOTA discovery, method analysis, and implementation guidance from arXiv, Semantic Scholar, Hugging Face Papers, and Perplexity

plugins.name: code-coach
plugins.description: Claude Code fluency coach — teaches effective workflows, explains decisions, builds programming vocabulary, and suggests features you didn't know existed.

plugins.name: recall
plugins.description: Zero-infrastructure memory for Claude Code — episodic session logs, semantic codebase facts, compaction protection, relevance-filtered injection. Markdown-only, no daemon, no database.
